name: v1alpha1AppProjectSpec
description: v1alpha1AppProjectSpec schema from Argo CD API

clusterResourceBlacklist.name: ClusterResourceBlacklist contains list of blacklisted cluster level resources

clusterResourceWhitelist.name: ClusterResourceWhitelist contains list of whitelisted cluster level resources

destinationServiceAccounts.description: DestinationServiceAccounts holds information about the service accounts to be impersonated for the application sync operation for each destination.

destinations.name: Destinations contains list of destinations available for deployment

namespaceResourceBlacklist.name: NamespaceResourceBlacklist contains list of blacklisted namespace level resources

namespaceResourceWhitelist.name: NamespaceResourceWhitelist contains list of whitelisted namespace level resources

permitOnlyProjectScopedClusters.name: PermitOnlyProjectScopedClusters determines whether destinations can only reference clusters which are project-scoped

roles.name: Roles are user defined RBAC roles associated with this project

signatureKeys.name: SignatureKeys contains a list of PGP key IDs that commits in Git must be signed with in order to be allowed for sync

sourceNamespaces.name: SourceNamespaces defines the namespaces application resources are allowed to be created in

sourceRepos.name: SourceRepos contains list of repository URLs which can be used for deployment

syncWindows.name: SyncWindows controls when syncs can be run for apps in this project
